/usr/bin/ar qc libengine_renderer.a CMakeFiles/engine_renderer.dir/src/GLFWSurfaceProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_renderer.dir/src/command_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_renderer.dir/src/draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_renderer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_renderer.dir/src/swapchain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_renderer.dir/src/viewtest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_renderer.dir/src/vulkan_context.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libengine_renderer.a
